mapper.select: SELECT * FROM asset_account WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset_account (user_id, account_name, account_type, asset_category, currency, description, sort_order) VALUES (#{userId}, #{accountName}, #{accountType}, #{assetCategory}, #{currency}, #{description}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE asset_account SET account_name = #{accountName}, asset_category = #{assetCategory}, currency = #{currency}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE asset_account SET is_active = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
